text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide and I have been out walking for
quite a while.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: We've gone a pretty long way. You must be tired.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Since we still have plenty of time, why don't we
take a break and have some tea before heading
back?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
One of my favorite cafes is around here, so let's
go there.
She leads the way to our destination.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It's just past that corner over there.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Huh? That's strange...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
They're closed, though they're usually open at
this time...
choice_data_list: Maybe they're taking a day off.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Perhaps. Well, let's try somewhere else.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I heard a nice outdoor cafe just opened down the
street.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I haven't been there yet, but this is the perfect
opportunity to try it.

We arrive at a very fancy cafe with a sign
declaring it to be owned and managed by a
celebrity barista.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Wow, a celebrity barista runs it? It's no wonder
this menu is so elaborate.

This seems like a place for the younger crowd.
There are dozens of drinks to choose from, and
the selection of desserts is just as varied.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This is nothing like the establishments I usually
frequent, but it's the perfect place to bring a
friend.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It deserves a spot on my list, for sure.

With a highly skilled hand, Biwa Hayahide writes
down the cafe's name.
choice_data_list: Do you go to cafes often?
Do you go to cafes often?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes, sometimes with friends, and sometimes just
by myself.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
They're the perfect place to read a book on a
rainy day.
choice_data_list: Can you recommend any other places?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
They're the perfect place to read a book on a
rainy day.
choice_data_list: Can you recommend any other places?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
At first, I was merely looking for a nice spot to
read at, but now it's become something of a
habit.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh. Speaking of books, there's one I'd like to
recommend to you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's an autobiography by a legendary
Umamusume...
She takes the book out from her bag almost too nonchalantly.
choice_data_list:
...Do you always walk around with books in your
bag?

...Do you always walk around with books in your
bag?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I know it's rare in this age of digitization,
but...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I think I've just gotten used to having books in my
bag. It helps me feel at peace.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Anyway, this book is quite interesting.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I think you could learn a lot from it as a trainer.
Why don't you give it a try?
I spend some time reading with Biwa Hayahide...

While I'm at it, I gain some direct insight into how
she hones her intellect on a daily basis.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Of course.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But first, I need to know your criteria.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes. For example, do you plan to go on a
weekday or the weekend? And will you be there
in the morning, afternoon, or evening?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Do you plan to go by yourself or with others?
Additionally, are you looking for somewhere that
specializes in food or in drink?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Of course, there are also the issues of location
and how far you are willing to travel.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The more information you can give me, the more
well-equipped I'll be to recommend you a place.

For a moment, I feel like I'm talking with a real
estate agent because of how detailed her
inquiries are.

But with her quick thinking and analytical skills,
she really is able to make the best possible
recommendation for me.
